title: Xtra Dense Middle Eastern Chickpeas Umm Ali
description: Salty, dense, post-workout Middle Eastern dish featuring grilled naan, chickpeas, and yogurt, fused with Ayurvedic sattvic flavors.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to medium-high heat.
Lightly brush both sides of naan slices with olive oil and place them on the grill until charred spots appear, about 2 minutes per side.
In a bowl, whisk the yogurt with lemon juice, cumin, coriander, turmeric, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Spread the yogurt mixture evenly over the grilled naan slices.
Sprinkle the cooked chickpeas over the yogurt-coated naan.
Drizzle the remaining olive oil over the chickpeas and toss to coat.
Place the assembled naan, chickpeas, and yogurt mixture back onto the grill and cook for another 5 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld.
Remove from the grill and let the dish rest for 5 minutes to set the layers.
Sprinkle chopped cilantro over the top for freshness.
Slice the dense umm-ali into squares and serve hot.
